title: BEM-832 verify results
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 21:04 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except: return {}
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
results=[]
for p in sorted(Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_results').glob('*.status.json')) if Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_results').exists() else []:
    results.append({'path':str(p),'text':read(p)[:700]})
marker=load('governance/state/workflow_dispatch_queue_processor_marker.json')
runtime=load('governance/state/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.json')
status='results_present' if results else ('marker_present_no_results' if marker.get('status') else 'marker_missing_no_results')
next_action='parse results' if results else ('patch result writer' if marker.get('status') else 'patch runner placement')
state={'bem':'BEM-832','status':status,'results':results[-10:],'marker':marker,'runtime_started_at':runtime.get('started_at'),'runtime_completed_at':runtime.get('completed_at'),'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem832_verify_results_after_831.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem832_verify_results_after_831.md').write_text('# BEM-832 | Verify Results After BEM-831 | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem832_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-832'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem832_verify_results_after_831.json','governance/reports/bem832_verify_results_after_831.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem832_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Verified workflow_dispatch_results and processor marker after BEM-831 tick')
"""
No issue comments.
